'''Nelinik''' was a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who lived some time before the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Nelinik killed the [[Echani High Protector]] using [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. In retaliation for this event, Nelinik was killed by [[Sanasiki]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
